title: 🏷️ RACING EVENT
data_structure:
```
[
    {
        name: 'name',
        datatype: 'string',
        mandatory: true,
        example: 'GP Monaco',
        scope: 'user',
        validation: ['mandatory', 'string'],
    },
    {
        name: 'round',
        datatype: 'number',
        mandatory: false,
        example: 7,
        scope: 'user',
        validation: ['number'],
    },
    {
        name: 'date_from',
        datatype: 'string',
        mandatory: false,
        example: '2025-05-20',
        scope: 'user',
        validation: ['string'],
    },
    {
        name: 'date_to',
        datatype: 'string',
        mandatory: false,
        example: '2025-05-22',
        scope: 'user',
        validation: ['string'],
    },
]
```
